description: Waffle chart of 100 squares in a 10-by-10 grid, each square one percent of North Carolina students in 2025: 35 teal squares for the 34.6 percent who reached Level 4 or 5 (college- and career-ready), the rest grey for Levels 1 to 3.

title.text: 35 of every 100 NC students reached Level 4 or 5
subtitle: Share of NC students at Level 4 or 5 (college- and
career-ready, CCR), 2025. Each square = 1% of students.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI accountability test scores (achievement levels, all subjects and grades, all students), 2025. Style-guide demo.
